description: expression_edit light plus screen_replay phone moire+gamma cues

variation_requests.description: Change facial expression while preserving identity
variation_requests.detail: Neutral to slight smile, minor brow movement, relaxed to attentive

variation_requests.description: Screen replay capture — simulate a photo of a face displayed on a phone screen photographed by a physical camera
variation_requests.detail: Generate a realistic screen-replay image: a face shown on a phone screen and photographed with a camera. Must visibly exhibit at least 2 of these cues: Moiré / pixel grid — interference pattern from screen subpixels captured by camera; Gamma / contrast shift — colour/brightness characteristics of display capture. The face must be the dominant object (large enough for reliable face detection) and must remain matchable to the seed identity (high similarity score).
